name: empty_seq_to_set_empty
reason: empty sequence should convert to empty set — tests base case of to_set

name: push_preserves_existing_elements
reason: pushing should not remove existing elements from the set — tests monotonicity of push w.r.t. to_set

name: push_element_in_result_set
reason: pushed element must appear in the resulting set — tests basic correctness of the lemma's conclusion

name: duplicate_push_to_set_idempotent
reason: pushing a duplicate should not change the set — tests idempotence of set insert through the lemma

name: to_set_subset_of_push_to_set
reason: original set should be subset of pushed set — tests that push+to_set is monotone
